## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on content generation for Clerk, review agentic workflow, and address concerns about authentication terminology and best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Clerk team is preparing for an offsite in Iceland next week, which may slow down progress](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [GrowthX has implemented an agentic workflow for content generation, showing promising results](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [There's ongoing discussion about using "auth" vs "authentication" in content, considering SEO and LLM search implications](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Clarification needed on specific technical preferences (e.g., password policies) to align with Clerk's standards](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

## Topics

### Clerk Team Offsite

  - [Team heading to Iceland for an offsite next week](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Activities planned: Northern Lights tour, Blue Lagoon visit, food tours](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Potential impact on content review and progress](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

### Content Generation Progress

  - [GrowthX has implemented an agentic workflow for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Three versions of articles now available for comparison: original, rewrite, and agentic rewrite](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Focus on getting content accurate and sharp before addressing design elements](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)

### Authentication Terminology

  - [Discussion on using "auth" vs "authentication" in content](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [Google Trends shows higher search volume for "authentication" but "auth" not far behind](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Consideration of LLM searches potentially favoring conversational terms like "auth"](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Proposal to test both terms in content to determine best approach](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

### Technical Preferences and Best Practices

  - [Need for clarification on Clerk's stance on specific technical recommendations (e.g., NIST password policies)](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

  - [Plan to discuss these details with Jeff (Clerk's technical authority) during the upcoming deep dive](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### Content Structure and Best Practices

  - [Alex requested insights on GrowthX's best practices for content structuring](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)

  - [GrowthX is adapting practices for LLM discovery, focusing on "chunkability" of content](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Ongoing A/B testing to determine effective structures for content discovery](https://fathom.video/share/M94NKNYBUC1P2Y8-PfP1sbikLtAhnC6t?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)
